label: PI-075 — tighten executive_summary to NOT NULL on planning_items, decisions, sessions. PI-074 deferred the NOT NULL pending row-level backfill; PI-096/097/098 (resolved at SES-106) delivered the backfill content; this session tightens the column constraint. Alembic migration 0023 adds NOT NULL and replaces the IS NULL OR ... CHECK with a stricter length-only form. Trailing soft-deleted DEC-312 backfilled inline before the migration runs so no row violates the new constraint. Conversations table not tightened (separate from PI-075 scope).

session.session_title: Resolve PI-075 — tighten executive_summary to NOT NULL via alembic migration 0023
session.session_description: Brief Claude Code session at Doug's terminal. PI-075 scoped both the backfill (delivered via PI-096/097/098, resolved at SES-106) and the NOT NULL tightening. With every live row populated (98 PIs, 309 live decisions, 74 sessions) plus the trailing soft-deleted DEC-312 backfilled inline at this session's start, the constraint switch is safe. Alembic migration 0023_pi_075_executive_summary_not_null applied cleanly against main's CRMBUILDER.db; smoke-test confirmed: too-short PATCH (9 chars) rejected with invalid_length, null PATCH a no-op (PATCH semantic — null means leave alone, not blank to null). Conversations table not tightened; its conversation_executive_summary field carries NULLs from PI-073's migration (legacy SES-NNN rows that became conversations didn't all have executive_summary content), and PI-075's original scope predates the redesigned conversation entity — separate work item.

conversation.conversation_title: Resolve PI-075 — NOT NULL tightening on executive_summary
conversation.conversation_purpose: Author and apply the alembic migration that tightens executive_summary to NOT NULL, then resolve PI-075.
conversation.conversation_description: Conversation that authors migration 0023, applies it to main's CRMBUILDER.db, smoke-tests the new constraints, and resolves PI-075 via the close-out's resolves_planning_items section. Pre-migration check found 4 NULLs (DEC-312 soft-deleted; SES-105, SES-106, SES-107 recent sessions) — all backfilled inline via existing scripts (sessions) and a direct PATCH (DEC-312) before the migration ran.
